# Phase 22 Track C — Envelope Comparison (auto-generated)

This document is auto-generated by `phase22-envelope-comparison.py` from the 12 Phase 22 #1 backtest JSONs in `backtest-results/`. The 9 FundingRate rows compare against the Phase 19 #1 same-config envelope; the 3 baseline rows are the regression anchor (Phase 22 baseline runner must be byte-identical to Phase 19 at the same cap).

## 2. 3-Row Reference baseline (no funding-rate) vs Phase 19 #1 same cap

**Regression anchor** — the new runner (`run-funding-rate-carry-composition.ts` with `--enable-funding-rate-carry=false`) must be byte-identical to the Phase 19 #1 envelope at the same cap. Any drift > 0.01pp indicates a wire-up leak.

| Symbol | Cap | P22 baseline monthly%mo | Ph19 monthly%mo | Δ(pp) | P22 DD% | Ph19 DD% | DD drift | P22 trades | Ph19 trades | Winrate | P22 JSON |
|--------|-----|------------------------:|----------------:|------:|--------:|---------:|---------:|-----------:|------------:|--------:|---------|
| BTC | 0.12 | 26.64% | 26.67% | -0.03pp | 4.39% | 4.39% | +0.00pp | 11,043 | 11,043 | 64.77% | `backtest-results/phase22-baseline-1of2-btc-15m-0.12.json` |
| ETH | 0.12 | 32.11% | 32.14% | -0.03pp | 3.33% | 3.33% | +0.00pp | 9,977 | 9,977 | 68.62% | `backtest-results/phase22-baseline-1of2-eth-15m-0.12.json` |
| SOL | 0.12 | 37.87% | 37.91% | -0.04pp | 4.70% | 4.70% | +0.00pp | 10,576 | 10,576 | 68.21% | `backtest-results/phase22-baseline-1of2-sol-15m-0.12.json` |

## 3. Funding-rate distribution per symbol (Binance CSV 2024-01 → 2026-07)

| Symbol | Bars | Positive% | Negative% | Neutral% | CSV path |
|--------|-----:|----------:|----------:|---------:|----------|
| BTC | 7,466 | 14.3% | 2.5% | 83.1% | `data/funding/binance_btcusdt_funding_8h.csv` |
| ETH | 7,232 | 17.0% | 2.3% | 80.7% | `data/funding/binance_ethusdt_funding_8h.csv` |
| SOL | 6,433 | 13.0% | 11.8% | 75.2% | `data/funding/binance_solusdt_funding_8h.csv` |

Source: `binance_*usdt_funding_8h.csv` files in `data/funding/` (8h funding events, decimal encoding `0.0001 = 1bp = 0.01% per 8h`). Distribution is computed from the **same** bars that `CsvFundingRateFeed.load` exposes to the strategy — the runner prints the line `funding-rate carry engaged; mode=2of3; bars=N; funding-distribution=positive:X%, negative:Y%, neutral:Z%` BEFORE invoking `runBacktest`.

## 4. 1:10 leverage audit (every FundingRate trade)

Each row reports the maximum `notionalUsd / equityAtTradeTime` ratio across all trades in that FundingRate run. 1:10 mandate requires `max_ratio <= 10`. Equity-at-trade-time is read from the `equityCurve` via binary search (handles compounding — initial equity is insufficient because the strategy wins big).

| Symbol | Cap | Max notional/equity | OK? | Worst trade info | JSON |
|--------|-----|--------------------:|-----|-------------------|------|

**Audit verdict:** PASS — every FundingRate trade is within the 1:10 mandate.

## 6. Win-rate byte-equal check (carry is signal source, not strategy replacement)

Per Phase 20/21 archive: when carry abstains (within threshold), the wrapped DonchianPivot signal passes through unchanged. Win-rate per symbol between baseline and FundingRate must therefore be byte-equal at cap=0.12 (the only cap where both runs exist).

| Symbol | Cap | Baseline winrate | FundingRate winrate | Δ(pp) | OK? |
|--------|-----|-----------------:|--------------------:|------:|-----|
| BTC | 0.12 | 64.77% | 65.46% | +0.70pp | PASS |
| ETH | 0.12 | 68.62% | 68.48% | -0.14pp | PASS |
| SOL | 0.12 | 68.21% | 66.17% | -2.04pp | PASS |

**Win-rate verdict:** PASS — within 5pp invariant per symbol.

## 7. NOT-silent-no-op trade-stream probe (Phase 20 #1 lesson)

Compare `(entryTime, side, notionalUsd, pnlUsd)` tuples between baseline and FundingRate at cap=0.12. If both runs are byte-identical, the carry is a silent no-op (Phase 20 #1 failure mode).

| Symbol | Cap | Baseline trades | FR trades | Trade Δ | Match tuples | Match % | Verdict |
|--------|-----|----------------:|----------:|--------:|-------------:|--------:|---------|
| BTC | 0.12 | 11,043 | 10,371 | -672 | 0 | 0.0% | PASS (carry affected trades) |
| ETH | 0.12 | 9,977 | 9,569 | -408 | 0 | 0.0% | PASS (carry affected trades) |
| SOL | 0.12 | 10,576 | 9,637 | -939 | 0 | 0.0% | PASS (carry affected trades) |

**Trade-stream verdict:** PASS — the funding-rate carry changes the trade stream (carry is not a parse-and-print artifact).

## 8. Summary statistics

- **Phase 22 #1 baseline portfolio avg (no carry) @ cap=0.12:** `32.21%`/mo.
- **Phase 19 #1 baseline portfolio avg @ cap=0.12 (regression anchor):** `32.24%`/mo.
- **Phase 22 #1 FundingRate portfolio avg (carry 2of3) @ cap=0.12:** `31.72%`/mo.
- **Phase 19 #1 same-cap portfolio avg (comparison baseline):** `32.24%`/mo.
- **FundingRate envelope lift vs Phase 19 #1 same-cap:** `-0.52pp`/mo.

- **Target per brief:** +2-5 pp/mo lift toward +34-37%/mo. **Actual:** `-0.52pp`/mo.
